objective: Align bridged Responses SSE with native Codex response pattern so routed chat models get native-style tool-cell grouping. Hypothesis: raw reasoning exposed as Thinking text splits exec cells; native reasoning items do not. WP1 diagnosis (bridge paths + codex-rs grouping/rendering evidence via gpt-5.5 explorers + live glm-5.2 SSE capture) -> diagnosis doc. WP2 implement diagnosed alignment (native-shaped reasoning emission / display mode reusing hideThinkingSummary; reasoning never between same-turn function_calls). WP3 verify (SSE-shape tests, live re-probe, full suite + tsc, fresh gpt-5.5 review, SoT sync). Scope src/bridge.ts, src/responses/*, openai-chat event mapping, types, tests, devlog. OUT gui/docs-site/cursor/native passthrough. DONE = evidence-backed diagnosis + wire-shape parity + gates green + reviewer pass; app-visual confirmation is user residual. Budget 3 work-phases ~90min, subagents gpt-5.5 only.

workPhases.title: Diagnosis: what splits tool cells, native reasoning shape

tasks.title: Map bridge reasoning emission paths (raw vs summary, hideThinkingSummary)
codex-rs evidence: grouping breakers + native reasoning item shape (gpt-5.5 explorers)
Live glm-5.2 streamed SSE capture and item-sequence comparison
Live re-probe shows new wire shape
Full suite + tsc + fresh gpt-5.5 review + SoT sync

criteria.scenario: Diagnosis names the exact grouping splitter(s) with codex-rs/source or capture evidence
criteria.expectedEvidence: devlog diagnosis doc with path:line / capture excerpts
criteria.capturedEvidence: devlog/_plan/260709_native_response_pattern/000_diagnosis.md: splitter = reasoning_raw_delta ignoring hideThinkingSummary; codex-rs permalinks (chatwidget.rs:1220, replay.rs:112, streaming.rs:227) prove empty reasoning items are not barriers; catalog default_reasoning_summary=none verified live

criteria.scenario: Bridged reasoning emission matches the diagnosed native pattern
criteria.expectedEvidence: unit tests asserting the new SSE item shape/ordering pass
criteria.capturedEvidence: tests/bridge-raw-reasoning-hidden.test.ts: hidden streamed/non-streamed emit envelope-only reasoning (summary:[], txt-only ocxr1), no reasoning_text.delta; visible mode regression-locked; 1724 pass

criteria.scenario: Reasoning items never interleave between same-turn function_call items
criteria.expectedEvidence: unit test on multi-call turn ordering passes
criteria.capturedEvidence: Hidden flush fires at tool_call_start barrier BEFORE function_call items; openai-chat flushes calls atomically at finish (reviewer-verified bridge.ts:412/490/580 + openai-chat.ts:347/371); test 1 asserts envelope item + intact call sequence

criteria.scenario: Live glm-5.2 probe emits the aligned shape end-to-end
criteria.capturedEvidence: Live glm-5.2 probe on temp dev instance :10199 (2026-07-09): zero reasoning_text.delta, envelope-only reasoning item with decodable txt, two function_calls, completed

criteria.expectedEvidence: full bun test + tsc exit 0; fresh gpt-5.5 reviewer PASS/folded
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun test 1724 pass / 0 fail (175 files), tsc exit 0; fresh gpt-5.5 reviewer Dirac VERDICT: PASS with zero blockers
